options.flavourText: Good karma follows you always.
options.imageDesc: orange and white cap with yin-yang patterns and karma symbol embroidery throughout

options.flavourText: Odds always break your way.
options.imageDesc: red and gold helmet with dice patterns, chance wheels, and probability symbols all over
options.colors: red, gold, and white dice and wheels

options.name: Star Speckled Helm
options.flavourText: Stars guide you to victory.
options.imageDesc: dark blue helmet covered with star patterns and twinkling star designs throughout
options.colors: dark blue, white, and gold stars

options.name: Victory Vibes Visor
options.flavourText: Vibes so lucky, wins are guaranteed.
options.imageDesc: pink and rainbow visor with positive vibes symbols and victory pattern designs
options.colors: hot pink, rainbow, and gold victory

options.name: Miraculous Mask
options.flavourText: Miracles happen when you wear this.
options.imageDesc: white and gold mask with miraculous starburst patterns and divine light effects
options.colors: white, gold, and bright yellow light

options.name: Lucky Llama Loafers
options.flavourText: Alpaca wool brings all the good vibes.
options.imageDesc: Cozy brown loafer-style cleats with white fuzzy alpaca wool trim around the ankles. Embroidered llama faces on each heel, smiling with closed eyes. Soft fleece lining visible at the cuff. Multiple pom-poms dangling from the sides in cream and tan.

options.name: Four-Leaf Flyers
options.flavourText: Sprout them and they grow more lucky.
options.imageDesc: Bright green high-top cleats with a textured clover leaf pattern embossed across the upper. Real four-leaf clovers pressed under clear resin panels on the toe and heel. Iridescent shimmer coating that catches light. Gold metallic cleats on the sole.
options.colors: green, gold, light green, dark green

options.name: Cosmic Crocs
options.flavourText: Luck travels at light speed in these.
options.imageDesc: Neon purple high-top crocs-style cleats covered in glowing neon green star and galaxy patterns. Holes arranged in constellation shapes across the vamp. Holographic coating that shifts from purple to teal. Thick bubbly padding on the collar and insole.
options.colors: neon purple, neon green, hot pink, cyan

options.name: Rainbow Rovers
options.flavourText: Every color means double the luck.
options.imageDesc: Athletic cleats with seven distinct color bands running horizontally across the upper: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet. Each band has its own texture. White midsole and sole with prismatic cleats that sparkle.

options.name: Pickle Pickers
options.flavourText: Surprisingly lucky. Also smell a little funky.
options.imageDesc: Yellowish-green canvas sneaker-style cleats with a bumpy pickle skin texture throughout. Dark green pickle brines dripping down from the ankle opening. Small pickle brine drops as graphic accents on the sides. Lime green sole.

options.name: Jellyfish Jetblasts
options.flavourText: Floats around luck like tentacles of fortune.
options.imageDesc: Translucent gel-textured cleats in soft pink and purple. Wavy tentacle-like ribbons of elastic trailing from the heel and sides, giving a jellylike appearance. Bioluminescent accents in light blue that glow in the upper region. Bulbous rounded toe design.
options.colors: pink, plum, sky blue, hot pink

options.name: Starburst Stompers
options.flavourText: Pure candy-colored good fortune.
options.imageDesc: Bright candy-colored cleats with a large starburst sunburst design on the outer side. Color sections radiate outward: hot pink, neon yellow, electric blue, lime green, and purple. Glossy candy-coated finish. Glitter embedded throughout the surface.
options.colors: hot pink, yellow, cyan, lime green

options.name: Wishbone Warriors
options.flavourText: Pulled a thousand lucky wishes. Still undefeated.
options.imageDesc: Tan suede cleats shaped like a wishbone at the toe, with two points splitting apart. Cream and gold stitching outlining the wishbone design. Embroidered ornate wish symbols and stars down the sides. Bone-white accents at the heel and collar. Gold metallic trim.

options.name: Penny Pinchers
options.flavourText: Every step feels like finding money.
options.imageDesc: Copper and bronze metallic cleats with embossed coin patterns covering the entire upper. Raised circular penny shapes in a repeating pattern. Shiny penny-bright copper surface with darker bronze accents and shadows. Coin-slot-like design at the heel.

options.name: Superstring Slippers
options.flavourText: Knitted from the strings of fate itself.
options.imageDesc: Cozy slipper-style cleats in soft gray and white, made from thick knitted fabric with a cable-knit texture. Silver thread woven through the knit in spiral patterns representing cosmic strings. Fluffy faux fur ankle cuff in white. Comfortable rounded toe.

options.name: Dragon Scale Boots
options.flavourText: They are so fierce, even the ball is scared to touch them!
options.imageDesc: High-top soccer cleats covered in overlapping iridescent dragon scales that shimmer from deep purple to electric blue. Sharp metallic spikes protrude from the heel and sides. Gold trim runs along the collar. Smoke-like wisps curl around the ankle area.

options.name: Rocket Sole Sneakers
options.flavourText: Leaves a trail of flame, literally the hottest kicks on the pitch!
options.imageDesc: Sleek futuristic soccer boots with bright orange and red flame decals along the sides. The sole features glowing blue energy lines and small rocket fins protruding from the heel. Chrome accents and triangular speed stripes emphasize velocity.

options.name: Pizza Pouncer Cleats
options.flavourText: Smells like victory and mozzarella. Coaches hate this one trick!
options.imageDesc: Soccer cleats designed to look like a pepperoni pizza slice. Red canvas upper with white diagonal melted cheese drips. Brown studs represent pepperoni cups. Yellow cheese trim around the collar. Crust-colored rubber sole.

options.name: Thunder Kick Boots
options.flavourText: Every goal scored creates an actual lightning bolt!
options.imageDesc: Black and neon yellow soccer cleats with jagged lightning bolt patterns running vertically along the sides. Electric arcs crackle between the cleats visually. Bright yellow accents on the laces and collar. Metallic silver studs reflect like electricity.
options.colors: black, neon yellow, metallic silver, electric blue

options.name: Tiger Claw Crushers
options.flavourText: Pounce on defenders and they will never recover!
options.imageDesc: Orange and black striped soccer cleats with an aggressive tiger face pattern on the tongue. Sharp white claw marks rake across the sides of the shoe. Black whisker stripes run along the heel. Curved studs resemble tiger claws.

options.name: Comet Crushers
options.flavourText: Zoom through the pitch leaving blazing trails of pure glory!
options.imageDesc: Sleek silver and white soccer cleats with a glowing comet tail painted on both sides. Trailing stardust and sparkle effects emanate from the heel. Constellation patterns dot the upper. Reflective material gives an outer-space sheen.

options.name: Volcano Vortex Kicks
options.flavourText: Stomp so hard the ground shakes!
options.imageDesc: Deep crimson and black soccer cleats with flowing magma texture on the upper. Bright orange glowing cracks run through the shoe as if lava leaks inside. Smoke puffs rise from the collar. Volcanic rock-textured studs.

options.name: Quantum Quake Boots
options.flavourText: They exist in two places at once. Defenders can't mark you!
options.imageDesc: Neon green and deep purple soccer cleats with a split-screen design. Glitch art patterns and pixelated distortion effects cover the sides. Holographic metallic accents catch light unpredictably.
options.colors: neon green, deep purple, silver, black

options.name: Typhoon Twist Treads
options.flavourText: Spin so fast you create your own weather system!
options.imageDesc: Turquoise and cyan soccer cleats with spiral whirlwind patterns spiraling from toe to heel. Wave-like ridges texture the surface. White foam accents suggest ocean spray. Curved studs look like mini tornados. Glossy, wet-looking finish.

options.name: Unicorn Glitter Stompers
options.flavourText: Magical, sparkly, and somehow still effective at scoring goals!
options.imageDesc: Pastel pink and lavender soccer cleats covered entirely in holographic glitter that catches rainbow light. A gold unicorn silhouette adorns each heel. Iridescent mane-like material flows from the collar. Prismatic studs sparkle with every step.
options.colors: pastel pink, lavender, gold, iridescent white

options.name: Rocket Boosters
options.flavourText: Fins on the heels. Physics not included.
options.imageDesc: Sleek red and silver cleats with large triangular fins protruding from the heel like rocket nozzles. Silver metallic stripes run along the sides. The sole is glowing orange-yellow as if hot from propulsion. Laces are thick silver cord.

options.name: Dragon Claws
options.flavourText: Now with extra pointy toe talons!
options.imageDesc: Midnight blue cleats with scaled texture across the upper. Sharp golden claws extend from the toe box like dragon talons. Red accents run along the heel and sides. Spiky ridges run down the center.

options.name: Enchanted Pepperonis
options.flavourText: They smell like victory and marinara.
options.imageDesc: Round, puffy cleats shaped like giant pepperoni slices. Reddish-brown with orange and yellow cheese spots on the surface. White stitching around the edges. The sole is yellow like melted mozzarella. Comically oversized.

options.name: Lightning Strikers
options.flavourText: Shoots faster than you can blink. Probably.
options.imageDesc: Neon yellow cleats with jagged purple lightning bolt streaks covering the entire upper. Electric blue accents on the heel and toe. The laces glow bright cyan. Silver metallic treads on the sole in zigzag patterns.
options.colors: neon yellow, purple, electric blue, silver

options.name: Pirate Pegleg Specials
options.flavourText: Wooden foot? Sounds like a goal to me.
options.imageDesc: Brown wooden cleats styled like a pirate pegleg. Brass buckles and rivets cover the surface. A skull emblem is burned into the heel. Black leather straps wrap around the ankle. The sole has brass nails forming a crossbones pattern.

options.name: Spaghetti Swirlers
options.flavourText: Twirl them on the field for extra zing!
options.imageDesc: Tan-colored cleats with long strands of pasta spiraling around the upper in cream and light brown. Tomato red sauce splatter details across the surface. The sole is dusted with parmesan powder white. Oversized and silly proportions.
options.colors: tan, cream, tomato red, powder white

options.name: Atomic Roller Skates
options.flavourText: Wheels not actually atomic. But they are close!
options.imageDesc: Retro 1950s-style roller skate cleats in turquoise and hot pink. Four glowing green wheels on the sole instead of cleats. Chrome buckles and rivets. Lightning bolts streaked across the sides. The heel has a miniature radiation symbol.
options.colors: turquoise, hot pink, lime green, chrome silver

options.name: Phoenix Fire Kicks
options.flavourText: They rise from the ashes. And also score goals.
options.imageDesc: Deep orange cleats with flame patterns in reds, yellows, and golds. Feather-like textures cover the upper. The heel and toe glow like embers. Ash-gray accents on the sole. Wisps of smoke-like patterns spiral up the sides.
options.colors: deep orange, red, gold, ash gray

options.name: Bubble Tea Crushers
options.flavourText: Tapioca pearls equal instant confidence boost.
options.imageDesc: Cream and brown boba tea-inspired cleats. Large translucent bubble designs on the sides showing pearlescent tapioca balls inside. The upper is a warm tan with dark brown tea stains. Pink and purple gradients swirl across. Whipped cream detail on the toe.

options.name: Ninja Star Slashers
options.flavourText: Silent goal-scoring. Lethal accuracy. Zero mercy.
options.imageDesc: All-black ninja cleats with metallic silver star patterns that form sharp geometric designs. Silver shuriken shapes protrude slightly from the toe and heel. Dark gray accent stripes. The sole has razor-sharp silver cleats arranged like weapons. Minimalist and deadly aesthetic.
options.colors: black, metallic silver, dark gray, charcoal

options.name: Rocket Boots
options.flavourText: Go so fast your teammates think you teleported.
options.imageDesc: Sleek athletic cleats with a metallic silver and neon orange color scheme. The sides feature pixelated flame designs running from heel to toe. The sole has red and yellow stripes suggesting propulsion. Small rocket fins protrude from the heel.

options.name: Dragon Stompers
options.flavourText: These boots came with a fire-breathing guarantee.
options.imageDesc: Rugged cleats designed like dragon feet with scaled texture. Deep purple base with golden scales across the upper. The toe box has small gold spikes. Red fabric between the scales suggests dragon skin.

options.name: Pizza Kicks
options.flavourText: Everyone wants to tackle you... for a slice.
options.imageDesc: Comical pizza-themed cleats with a light tan base resembling crust. Red sauce drips down the sides. Pepperoni circles and green pepper toppings across the upper. Mozzarella white stripes wrap around the mid-foot.

options.name: Lightning Strikers
options.flavourText: Strike the ball. Strike like lightning. Same thing.
options.imageDesc: Electric blue cleats with bright yellow zigzag lightning bolt patterns covering the entire upper. White accents along the sole edge. Small electricity effects crackle down the sides. The cleats have a glossy, energetic appearance.
options.colors: electric blue, bright yellow, white, light blue

options.name: Ninja Slippers
options.flavourText: Silent footsteps. Loud goals. Perfect combo.
options.imageDesc: Sleek black cleats styled like ninja shoes with a wrapped cloth appearance. Crimson red accent stripes run along the sides. White stitching details cover the upper. Small white symbols resembling Japanese characters decorate the ankle cuff.
options.colors: black, crimson red, white, dark gray

options.name: Bouncy Boots
options.flavourText: Gravity just became optional.
options.imageDesc: Hot pink and cyan gradient cleats with spring coil designs visible on the heel and toe. Bright lime green accents highlight the midsole. The upper has a bouncy, puffy appearance with cloud-like puffing details. Stars and motion lines surround the entire shoe.
options.colors: hot pink, cyan, lime green, white

options.name: Tiger Talons
options.flavourText: Every step sounds like a prowling predator.
options.imageDesc: Orange cleats with bold black tiger stripe patterns. The toe area features sharp black claw shapes extending slightly. White accents on the inner side. Orange and black gradients fade across the mid-foot creating a fierce appearance.

options.name: Comet Crushers
options.flavourText: You'll leave a crater every time you accelerate.
options.imageDesc: Metallic gray cleats with streaking cosmic effects. A trail of purple and blue space dust trails behind from heel to toe. A small comet illustration on the upper with a tail effect. Silver metal-like panels and black cosmic speckles cover the surface.

options.name: Forest Flyers
options.flavourText: Grown from enchanted trees. Very eco-friendly.
options.imageDesc: Natural leaf-green cleats with brown tree bark texture details. Bright lime and emerald accents create leaf patterns across the upper. Vines wrap around the ankle cuff in darker green. Wooden-grain texture and leaf silhouettes decorate the sides.
options.colors: leaf green, brown, lime, dark green

options.name: Sonic Speeders
options.flavourText: Leave a blue blur trail wherever you run.
options.imageDesc: Vibrant cyan and royal blue cleats designed with speed in mind. The entire shoe is covered in speed lines suggesting motion. A darker blue stripe runs along the sides. White and silver accents on the heel and toe create a sleek, aerodynamic look.

options.name: Comet Kicks
options.flavourText: These boots blaze trails of stardust. You are basically a meteor!
options.imageDesc: Sleek silver and navy blue cleats with a trailing comet tail design running along the sides. Gold lightning bolts streak across the forefoot. Sole has chrome metallic accents with small star patterns embossed throughout.

options.name: Inferno Stompers
options.flavourText: Lava-soaked boots. Enemies fear the ground you walk on.
options.imageDesc: Brilliant orange and red cleats with jagged flame patterns wrapping around the ankle and toe box. Glowing yellow accents simulate hot lava flowing down the sides. Studs are darker red like cooling magma.

options.name: Kraken Grips
options.flavourText: Tentacle-textured soles. Control the ball like an octopus!
options.imageDesc: Deep teal and purple cleats with rippled tentacle patterns across the upper. Suction cup-like textured nodules cover the sole and heel for grip. Iridescent blue-green shimmer throughout with wave details.

options.name: Popcorn Poppers
options.flavourText: Fluffy, bouncy boots. Makes every touch pop with power!
options.imageDesc: Pale yellow and white cleats designed to look like popcorn kernels. Bumpy, puffy texture covers the entire boot with little puffs sticking out. Golden accents simulate butter drips. Playful and cartoonish.

options.name: Thunderpaw Boots
options.flavourText: Wild wolf paws with electric claws. Rawr and score!
options.imageDesc: Steel gray and charcoal cleats shaped like a wolf hind paw. Bright electric blue claws extend from the toe box. Fluffy textured fur detail on the ankle with lightning bolt stitching. Feral and cool.

options.name: Dinosaur Dominators
options.flavourText: T-Rex sized power in your feet. Stomp, roar, and score!
options.imageDesc: Forest green and brown cleats with reptilian scaled texture across the surface. Dangerous-looking red spikes protrude from the heel and toe box like a T-Rex backbone. Claw-like studs underneath. Prehistoric ferocity.

options.name: Crystal Crushers
options.flavourText: Crystalline gems studded everywhere. Sparkle and smash!
options.imageDesc: Light purple and silver cleats encrusted with geometric faceted crystal formations across the entire upper. Large amethyst-like gems cluster on the toe box and heel. Reflective surfaces shimmer with rainbow light. Magical sparkle effect.

options.name: Rocket Blasters
options.flavourText: Red-hot rocket propulsion under your feet. Blast into goal!
options.imageDesc: Bright red and silver cleats with twin rocket nozzles molded into the heel. Flame-pattern decals run along the sides in orange and yellow. Metallic thruster details on the sole with grid patterns. Sci-fi speed aesthetic.

options.name: Phantom Shadows
options.flavourText: So dark and sneaky, opponents can't see them coming!
options.imageDesc: Midnight black and deep purple cleats with wispy shadow tendrils flowing across the surface. Ghostly white glowing accents outline the edges and studs. Smoky texture effect suggesting mystical darkness. Subtle white starry pattern.

options.name: Pickle Power
options.flavourText: Briny boot brilliance. Dill-ightfully good at scoring!
options.imageDesc: Bumpy green pickle-textured cleats with a slight shiny finish. Darker green veins crisscross the surface like pickle bumps. Yellow-brown accent patches suggest mustard seed details. Silly, playful design with orange studs underneath.

options.name: Rocket Stompers
options.flavourText: These boots have tiny jets. Your feet go WHOOOOSH!
options.imageDesc: Bright red and silver cleats with flame patterns on the sides. Small rocket nozzles protruding from the heel area, trailing cartoon fire wisps. Silver metallic accents along the sole with glowing red stripes running lengthwise.

options.name: Dragon Scale Boots
options.flavourText: Stomping feels extra powerful when you wear dragon scales.
options.imageDesc: Deep purple and gold cleats covered in interlocking dragon scales. Each scale has a metallic sheen with darker purple shadows. Gold trim around the ankle area with small spiked studs. Claws etched into the toe box.

options.name: Lightning Zappers
options.flavourText: Kick the ball so fast it leaves a smoke trail behind!
options.imageDesc: Bright yellow and electric blue cleats with jagged lightning bolt patterns across the entire surface. Blue electric arcs crackling around the sole and heel. White highlights creating a 3D electric effect. Small spiky protrusions suggesting energy discharge.

options.name: Cheetah Pounce Cleats
options.flavourText: Spot-on performance: literally covered in spots.
options.imageDesc: Sleek tan and black cleats with realistic cheetah spot patterns. Black patches scattered organically across the shoe body. Aerodynamic striped design along the sides mimicking cheetah fur. Sharp aggressive angles in the cleat studs.

options.name: Meteor Crushers
options.flavourText: These boots hit harder than actual space rocks. Probably.
options.imageDesc: Dark grey and charcoal cleats with a rocky, crater-filled texture. Impact craters scattered across the surface with lighter grey damage streaks. Deep charcoal base with bright orange cracks suggesting hot meteor interior. Rugged, rough-hewn appearance throughout.

options.name: Sonic Speedsters
options.flavourText: Leave your opponents wondering which direction you went!
options.imageDesc: Cyan blue and white cleats with aerodynamic racing stripes running front to back. Speed lines etched in white create motion effect. Streamlined shoe body mimicking a race car. Bright cyan accents with chrome-like silver sole and heel pieces.

options.name: Volcano Stompers
options.flavourText: Feel the heat every time you touch the ball.
options.imageDesc: Deep red and orange gradient cleats resembling molten lava. Bright orange cracks running through dark red base suggesting hot magma underneath. Yellow highlights at the toe and heel for extreme heat effect. Textured, bubbly surface mimicking cooled lava.

options.name: Titanium Crushers
options.flavourText: Built tough. Kicks even tougher.
options.imageDesc: Gunmetal grey and silver cleats with industrial metallic panels. Geometric hexagon plating pattern across the body. Brushed metal finish with bold dark grey shadows for depth. Angular, mechanical design with reinforced ankle support visible. Steel-toed appearance.
options.colors: gunmetal grey, silver, black, dark blue

options.name: Phoenix Flame Boots
options.flavourText: Rise from defeat with style and very hot feet.
options.imageDesc: Vibrant orange and golden red cleats with flame feather patterns. Layered feather design creating texture, transitioning from orange at base to golden-yellow at tips. Fiery wisps and ember sparkles around the heel and sole. Mythical and majestic appearance.

options.name: Quantum Kickers
options.flavourText: Exist in multiple places at once. Confuses defenders.
options.imageDesc: Neon purple and bright green cleats with a split two-tone design. Holographic shimmer effect across the surface suggesting interdimensional energy. Bold geometric lines and pixelated pattern elements. Bright glowing accents where colors meet. Futuristic, high-tech appearance.
options.colors: neon purple, neon green, cyan, silver

options.name: Rocket Booties
options.flavourText: Feel the need for speed? These babies practically play by themselves!
options.imageDesc: Sleek red and silver rocket-themed cleats with flame patterns on the sides, metallic accents, glowing orange streaks along the soles, small rocket fins protruding from the heel, and sci-fi tech-inspired ridged texture across the toe box.

options.name: Dragon's Claws
options.flavourText: Now your feet are as deadly as a fire-breathing soccer legend.
options.imageDesc: Menacing purple and gold cleats designed like dragon claws, with sharp spike-like studs, iridescent scale texture covering the boot, glowing amber accents near the ankle, and curved talon shapes on the toe.

options.name: Penguin Waddle
options.flavourText: Adorably clumsy? These boots turn stumbles into style points.
options.imageDesc: Black and white cleats shaped like chubby penguin feet, with white belly section on the sole, round pom-pom details on the heel, beady eye embellishments, and fuzzy texture to look like penguin plumage.

options.name: Pizza Slice Kicks
options.flavourText: Score so much, you'll be cheesy for days!
options.imageDesc: Yellow and orange cleats designed as a pepperoni pizza slice, with red circle studs resembling pepperoni, melted cheese dripping details, wavy edges like crust, and a glossy tomato-sauce red accent stripe.

options.name: Lightning Bolts
options.flavourText: Struck by genius every time you kick.
options.imageDesc: Bright yellow and electric blue cleats with jagged lightning bolt patterns covering the entire boot, electric crackling effects along the edges, spiky studs shaped like electric arcs, and a charged energy glow aesthetic.

options.name: Unicorn Hooves
options.flavourText: Mythical goals only. You'll need a lot of glitter to clean these up.
options.imageDesc: Pastel pink and iridescent white cleats shaped like unicorn hooves, with a spiraling horn design on the ankle, shimmering glitter texture throughout, rainbow mane fringe details, and holographic sheen coating.

options.name: Ninja Tabi Boots
options.flavourText: Silent strikers wear these. You won't even hear yourself score.
options.imageDesc: Black and dark gray traditional ninja tabi-inspired cleats with a split toe design, textured cloth appearance, stealth-focused matte finish, white accent stripes along the sole edge, and traditional Japanese knot details.
options.colors: black, dark gray, white, deep blue

options.name: Bubble Gum Stompers
options.flavourText: The stickier you play, the more goals you stick around for.
options.imageDesc: Bright pink and magenta cleats with giant bubble texture, glossy candy-coated appearance, swirled white highlight streaks mimicking gum shine, bubble studs that look like chewed gum, and a shimmering translucent overlay.
options.colors: hot pink, magenta, white, light pink

options.name: Meteor Strike Cleats
options.flavourText: Players don't stand a chance when you crash the field.
options.imageDesc: Gray and charcoal black cleats with a cratered, pockmarked surface texture, molten red glowing cracks throughout, metallic silver rim details, impact crater studs, and a scorched, battle-worn aesthetic.

options.name: Rainbow Prism Kicks
options.flavourText: Refract your opponents defenses with pure optical confusion.
options.imageDesc: White base cleats with prismatic gradient bands running lengthwise in spectrum colors, crystalline faceted texture coating the entire boot, shimmering holographic sheen, light-refracting stud details, and rainbow reflect patterns.
options.colors: white, rainbow spectrum, crystal blue, silver

options.name: Thunderbolt Strikers
options.flavourText: Zap! Your feet are now 50% more electric than your personality.
options.imageDesc: Electric blue and bright yellow cleats with jagged lightning bolt patterns across the toe box and instep. Metallic silver threading follows each bolt. The sole glows with neon yellow edges. Spiky studs on the bottom gleam like tiny lightning rods.

options.name: Dragon Scale Boots
options.flavourText: Now your feet are as legendary as your trash talk. Probably.
options.imageDesc: Deep crimson red cleats covered in overlapping scale patterns like dragon armor. Each scale is outlined in gold with a shimmering gradient from red to orange. Pointed toe design. Small gold spikes emerge between scales. The heel features a stylized dragon head emblem in metallic gold.

options.name: Rocket Feet
options.flavourText: Warning: may cause uncontrollable need for speed and whooshing sounds.
options.imageDesc: Sleek silver and white racing-style cleats with flame designs bursting from the heel. Red and orange gradient flames trail up the back. The toe is pointed and aerodynamic. Three metallic red stripes run along each side. The sole has rocket-themed grip patterns with small red accents.

options.name: Pizza Kicks
options.flavourText: These boots are so cheesy, they might actually mozzarella on the field.
options.imageDesc: Warm golden-tan cleats styled to look like pizza crust. Red tomato-colored sections represent pizza slices with white mozzarella drip patterns. Dark red pepperoni circles dot the surface. Lighter tan edges suggest toasted crust. Studs look like scattered oregano specks.
options.colors: golden tan, crimson, white, dark green

options.name: Phantom Glide
options.flavourText: Wear these and suddenly you are not where the ball is going. Science!
options.imageDesc: Translucent ghostly white and pale blue cleats with a smoky, ethereal appearance. Swirling wisps and cloud patterns in dark blue and purple emanate from the edges. The material looks semi-transparent like mist. Glowing purple runes run along the sides. Studs appear as tiny glowing orbs.
options.colors: white, pale blue, indigo, dark orchid

options.name: Jungle Prowler
options.flavourText: You'll run like a leopard, pass like a monkey, score like a lion.

options.name: Quantum Stompers
options.flavourText: They exist in all positions at once until you look at them. Probably.
options.imageDesc: Iridescent holographic cleats that shift between purple, cyan, and magenta. Geometric grid patterns and sci-fi circuit designs cover the surface in bright neon lines. Angular, futuristic shape with sharp edges. The heel features a circular glowing eye-like design. Studs glow with electric blue light.

options.name: Comet Crushers
options.flavourText: Leave a trail of stardust. And possibly some confused defenders.
options.imageDesc: Deep midnight blue cleats with a cosmic theme. Silver and white star clusters burst across the surface with trailing comet tail streaks. Metallic silver swirls create galaxy patterns. The toe and heel glow with soft white highlights like celestial bodies. Studs shimmer like tiny stars.

options.name: Inferno Treads
options.flavourText: Warning: shoe may become literally too hot to handle. Cool kids only.
options.imageDesc: Fiery orange and deep red cleats styled like active lava. Bright yellow and orange gradient flames consume the upper surface. Dark charcoal cracks run through like cooled magma. The sole glows bright orange-red as if still hot. Metallic bronze studs glow with heat shimmer effect.

options.name: Mystic Moonboots
options.flavourText: Kick with the power of the moon. That is about 1/6 Earth power.

Starbursts and constellation patterns in silver thread. The heel features a large embossed crescent moon. Studs glow with pale blue ethereal light.
options.colors: white, lavender, light blue, royal blue

options.name: Spring-Loaded Bouncy Boots
options.flavourText: Your feet bounce before your brain catches up.
options.imageDesc: Bright neon green and cyan cleats with oversized coiled springs protruding from the sole and heel. The springs have a gleaming metallic silver finish with yellow accents. Cartoon-style puff clouds at the toe and heel. Striped leg section with alternating electric blue and lime stripes.

options.name: Dragon Scale Traction
options.flavourText: Scales catch anything. Even the referee is confused.
options.imageDesc: Deep crimson red cleats covered in overlapping dragon scales in gold and bronze. Spiky ridge running down the center of the foot. Smoky purple accents on the ankle cuff. Small flame-like texture detailing around the sole edge.

options.name: Mercury Quickstep Kicks
options.flavourText: So fast, they leave a shimmering trail behind.
options.imageDesc: Silver and pearl-white cleats with liquid mercury-like swirls painted across the surface. Chrome metallic spikes arranged in concentric circles. Winged ankle design inspired by the god Mercury. Iridescent shimmer effect throughout.

options.name: Cheese Grater Grip Boots
options.flavourText: Smells like cheddar. Still a tactical advantage.
options.imageDesc: Golden yellow and orange cleats textured like a cheese grater surface. Tiny perforated holes covering both sides. Bright white trim and laces. Small wheels or studs arranged in grid pattern on sole. Silly googly eyes embossed on the toe area.
options.colors: orange, golden yellow, white, dark orange

options.name: Phantom Precision Cleats
options.flavourText: Invisible to the naked eye. Visible to the ref.
options.imageDesc: Semi-transparent ghostly white and pale blue cleats with an ethereal, glowing appearance. Translucent sections showing phantom foot outlines inside. Wisps of cloud-like texture around edges. Tiny sparkles floating around the sole.
options.colors: white, pale blue, lavender, light blue

options.name: Meteor Crushers
options.flavourText: Impact crater optional. Opponent runs away.
options.imageDesc: Dark charcoal and black cleats with jagged, rough crater-like surface texture. Burnt orange and deep red molten streaks running across the foot like cooling lava. Smoke-effect wisps painted on ankle. Meteor-shaped studs on sole.
options.colors: charcoal, dark brown, tomato red, orange

options.name: Octopus Tentacle Tread
options.flavourText: Eight legs kick better than two. Science.

options.colors: hot pink, orchid purple, royal blue, light pink

options.name: Cyberpunk Reflex Boots
options.flavourText: Neon lights plus robot reflexes equals unbeatable.

options.name: Lightning Rod Runners
options.flavourText: Electricity is good for your reflexes. Trust us.
options.imageDesc: Bright yellow and purple cleats with jagged lightning bolt patterns. Electric blue crackling energy arcs across the foot. Metallic silver studs that look like they are conducting electricity. Smoking wisp details at the sole. Spiky hair-like protrusions around ankle.

options.name: Sticky Honey Grip Shoes
options.flavourText: Tacky and effective. Smell not included.
options.imageDesc: Golden honey and amber-colored cleats with a glossy, sticky-looking finish. Honeycomb pattern embossed all over. Chunky, oversized treads coated in dripping honey effect. Tiny bee designs on the ankle patch. Sweet and slightly cartoonish aesthetic.
options.colors: orange, dark goldenrod, khaki, dark yellow

options.name: Rocket Boots
options.flavourText: These feet leave fire trails. Hope they come with a fire extinguisher!
options.imageDesc: Sleek futuristic rocket-powered boots with silver metal plating, glowing blue propulsion thrusters on the heels, red flame accents, and small fins on the sides. Angular sci-fi design with bold details.
options.colors: silver, blue, and red with neon cyan accents

options.name: Cloud Walkers
options.flavourText: You can run on actual clouds now. Wet socks not guaranteed.

options.colors: white, light blue, and silver with misty white trails

options.name: Dragon Claw Kicks
options.flavourText: Scales, talons, and attitude. Every pass feels like fire.
options.imageDesc: Aggressive crimson and gold boots with dragon scale texturing across the surface, sharp curved talons extending from the toes, golden accents along the calf, and small horn-like spikes on the heel.
options.colors: crimson, gold, and deep orange with amber streaks

options.name: Jellyfish Jetties

options.name: Ninja Shadow Slippers

options.colors: black, deep purple, and grey with silver trim

options.name: Candy Crush Kicks
options.flavourText: These boots taste like bubble gum but please don't actually eat them.
options.imageDesc: Vibrant candy-colored boots with swirled pink, purple, and blue sections like swirled lollipops, shiny sugary gloss finish, candy wrapper-inspired ribbon details, round candy gem decorations.
options.colors: hot pink, purple, sky blue with glossy white highlights

options.name: Storm Striker Soles
options.flavourText: Harness lightning with every step. Electricity bill not included.
options.imageDesc: Dark grey and electric yellow boots with jagged lightning bolt patterns covering the surface, crackling electrical effects around the edges, metallic storm-grey base with bright voltage veins, dynamic angular design.
options.colors: dark grey, electric yellow, and cyan with white lightning effects

options.name: Mushroom Stompers

options.colors: bright red, white, tan with green stem details

options.name: Enchanted Hoofboots
options.flavourText: Centaur-approved. Makes you 40% more mystical.
options.imageDesc: Sleek magical boots with glowing golden hoofprints etched into the sides. Iridescent purple accents spiral around the ankle. Small crystalline antlers protrude from the heel. Ethereal blue aura emanates from the sole.

options.name: Rocket Treads
options.flavourText: Propelled by tiny jets. Beware of scorched grass.

options.name: Squid Slippers

options.name: Molten Lava Kicks
options.flavourText: Literally hot. Ice pack not included.

options.name: Pizza Stompers

options.name: Phoenix Rising Boots

Flames rendered in orange and red gradient emerging from the sides and heel. Golden metallic accents highlight the feather tips. Tail feathers extend up the back of the boot.
options.colors: flame orange, deep crimson, gold, smoky gray

options.name: Tornado Turbos

options.colors: sky blue, white, pale gray, electric blue

options.name: Dinosaur Stompers
options.flavourText: Raw prehistoric power. Meteor not sold separately.

options.name: Thunderstrike Spikes

options.colors: electric blue, copper bronze, white, charcoal

options.name: Dragon Scale Boots

options.name: Laser Blaster Kicks
options.flavourText: Neon glow-up. Your feet have special effects now!
options.imageDesc: Futuristic high-tech cleats with bright neon purple and cyan stripes, geometric patterns, LED-style light lines running down the sides, chrome metallic heel section, triangular neon yellow accents on cleats, sleek sci-fi design.

options.name: Thunderstorm Stompers
options.flavourText: Feel the electricity under your feet. Shocking results!

options.colors: dark slate gray, blue, white, gold

options.name: Pizza Slice Feet
options.flavourText: Cheesy moves guaranteed. Too delicious to stop!

options.name: Galactic Starlight Shoes
options.flavourText: Cosmic dust between your toes. Literally shooting stars.
options.imageDesc: Deep indigo and black cleats with scattered star patterns, milky white swirling galaxy effect across the upper, purple and teal nebula clouds, glittery sparkle texture throughout, moon phase designs on sides, cosmic dust particles effect.
options.colors: dark indigo, cyan, white, dark violet

options.name: Jungle Venom Kicks
options.flavourText: Poisonous pace. Opponents better watch out!
options.imageDesc: Lime green and black spotted cleats like a snake pattern, toxic yellow-green gradient lines, venomous purple undertones on the viper-like design, natural leaf texture details, fang-inspired cleat studs, scaled texture effect on upper.

options.name: Invisible Phantom Boots
options.flavourText: You can see them. Opponents can't. Mostly.
options.imageDesc: Translucent semi-transparent cleats with faint silver outline, ghostly white shimmer throughout, barely visible subtle details, ethereal glow effect around edges, phantom wisps flowing from the sole, nearly invisible but with shimmering highlights.

options.name: Inferno Magma Treads
options.flavourText: Hot lava flow feet. Leave scorched earth everywhere!

options.name: Unicorn Sparkle Glitter
options.flavourText: Rainbow magic feet. Leaves a trail of fabulousness!

options.name: Timber Beast Cleats

options.name: Rocket Roller Boots

options.name: Lightning Loafers
options.flavourText: Electricity not included, but speed is!

options.name: Cheetah Chompers

options.name: Tornado Traction Cleats
options.flavourText: Spin faster than your teammates can blink!
options.imageDesc: Classic cleats with a swirling gray and white tornado pattern covering the entire shoe. The studs are spiral-shaped and glow pale blue. Wind lines swirl around the shoe edges in white.

options.name: Dragon Scale Stompers
options.flavourText: When you want your feet to look absolutely legendary.

options.name: Supersonic Sneakers
options.flavourText: Fast enough to break the sound barrier!
options.imageDesc: Aerodynamic racing-style sneakers in sleek black with bright neon green accent stripes. Speed lines angle backward across the shoe. The sole features a chrome finish with crosshatch tread pattern.

options.name: Banana Blasters
options.flavourText: Slip past defenders faster than you can say peel out.

options.name: Phoenix Flame Kicks

options.colors: dark charcoal and rusty orange with verdigris highlights

options.name: Fortress Fortunes
options.flavourText: Your feet are tiny castles now. You're welcome.
options.imageDesc: Cleats shaped like medieval castle towers with crenellated tops, stone texture throughout the upper, arched doorway-shaped openings revealing reinforced inner chambers, small flag emblem on the heel.
options.colors: stone grey and deep slate with gold banner details

options.name: Gorilla Grips
options.flavourText: Your feet have the grip strength of a silverback.
options.imageDesc: Bulky ape-like cleats with exaggerated wrinkled leathery texture and visible muscle definition, oversized knuckle-inspired knobs and ridges covering the sole, dark fur-textured upper with realistic primate details.
options.colors: dark charcoal and leather brown with ochre muscle tones

options.name: Meteor Crushers
options.flavourText: Your cleats fell from space and hit HARD.
options.imageDesc: Space rock-textured cleats with a porous crater-covered surface, jagged irregular edges like a meteor, metallic iron core visible through breaks in the surface, glowing ember-orange cracks in darker stone.
options.colors: charcoal grey and obsidian black with orange ember cracks

options.name: Tank Treads
options.flavourText: Nothing stops a tank. Nothing stops you now.
options.imageDesc: Military tank tread-patterned cleats with linked metallic chain pattern across the sole, armored plating visible on upper and heel, riveted metal details throughout, realistic khaki fabric with olive drab camouflage pattern.
options.colors: khaki and olive drab with gunmetal grey treads

options.name: Flame Striker Boots
options.flavourText: Your feet are literally on fire, careful not to singe the grass!
options.imageDesc: Sleek red and orange cleats with flame patterns wrapping around the sides. Yellow highlights along the sole edges that look like dancing flames. Small flame-shaped studs on the bottom. Metallic gold accents near the ankles.

options.name: Sonic Surge Cleats
options.flavourText: Go so fast, your cleats leave sonic booms and cartoon speed lines.
options.imageDesc: Bright electric blue cleats with white lightning bolt streaks across both shoes. Cyan glow effects radiating from the sides. Pointed, aerodynamic design with sharp white trim. Neon speed lines etched into the material.

options.name: Dragon Talons
options.flavourText: Scaled boots that make you feel like a tiny soccer dragon warrior.
options.imageDesc: Deep purple cleats with iridescent dragon scale texture across the entire surface. Sharp metallic silver claw-like studs jutting from the sole. Gold armor-plating details on the heel and toe. Glowing red gemstone accent on the ankle.

options.name: Pizza Party Kicks
options.flavourText: Pepperoni power! Smelly socks not included with purchase.
options.imageDesc: Warm orange-red cleats designed to look like pizza. Tan and white checkerboard pattern on the tongue representing mozzarella. Yellow-orange circles scattered across. Brown triangular studs like crusty pizza crust edges.

options.name: Crystal Prism Boots
options.flavourText: Sparkle so bright, opponents need sunglasses to look at your feet.
options.imageDesc: Clear translucent cleats with rainbow iridescent internal crystalline structures visible inside. Sharp geometric facet patterns etched across the surface. Rainbow light refraction effects. Prism-shaped studs that shimmer with multiple colors.

options.name: Jungle Claw Cleats
options.flavourText: You are not just playing soccer, you are a wild jungle beast.
options.imageDesc: Dark green and teal cleats with leopard spot patterns. Curved tiger-stripe markings in black and gold. Large curved claw-shaped studs protruding from the sole. Vine-like texture details wrapping around the ankle cuff.

options.name: Icebreaker Skates
options.flavourText: So cool, your opponents slip on their own sweat trying to defend.
options.imageDesc: Pristine white and pale blue cleats with frosted glass texture. Crystalline ice spikes forming the studs on the sole. Snowflake etchings covering the sides. Frozen gradient effect from white to icy blue with silver frost highlights.
options.colors: white, pale blue, silver, icy cyan

options.name: Rocket Blaster Boots
options.flavourText: With exhaust flames and a jet engine vibe, you need a landing runway.
options.imageDesc: Sleek silver and black cleats styled like rocket ships. Red and orange jet flame decals on the heel area. Metallic exhaust port details on the sole. Pointed nose cone design at the toe with window-like stripe details.

options.name: Goblin Gold Stompers
options.flavourText: Treasure hunting midfielder? These boots attract luck and loose change.
options.imageDesc: Chunky brown and bronze cleats with ornate gold trim details. Embossed gold coin patterns across the surface. Goblin-like irregular spiky studs with metallic gold coating. Leather texture with jeweled accents on the ankle.

options.name: Neon Pulse Runners
options.flavourText: Glow in the dark, now your sweaty feet are a nightclub on the field.
options.imageDesc: Black base cleats with neon pink and neon green racing stripes down the sides. Pulsing gradient effect from neon pink to neon green. Glow-in-the-dark studs on the sole. Reflective stripe patterns mimicking futuristic gear.
options.colors: black, neon pink, neon green, reflective white

options.name: Rocket Boots
options.flavourText: These babies have tiny jet engines. Your feet finally move fast.
options.imageDesc: Sleek red and silver cleats with flame decals on the sides, metallic rocket fins protruding from the heels, glowing orange accents around the sole, and tiny thruster nozzles at the toe.

options.name: Dragon Scales
options.flavourText: Forged from mythical dragon hide. Opponents will think twice.
options.imageDesc: Purple cleats covered in overlapping iridescent scale patterns, each scale outlined in gold, with small pointed ridges along the sides, sharp metallic spikes running down the centerline, and glowing amber gemstones embedded at pressure points.

options.name: Lightning Kicks
options.flavourText: Electricity not included, but bragging rights definitely are.
options.imageDesc: Bright yellow cleats with electric blue zigzag patterns crackling across the surface, white lightning bolt stripes along the sides, glowing electric blue accents at the seams, and sparking effects suggested by pointed star shapes on the sole.

options.name: Cheese Wedges
options.flavourText: Made from actual Swiss cheese. Surprisingly durable and delicious-smelling.
options.imageDesc: Golden-yellow cleats shaped like wedges of cheese with realistic holes scattered across the surface at various sizes, white crust texture along the edges, dark orange shading in the holes for depth, and a tiny mouse paw print on the heel.
options.colors: golden yellow, white, dark orange, tan

options.name: Penguin Feet
options.flavourText: Waddle onto the pitch with confidence. You are basically a pro now.
options.imageDesc: Black cleats with white belly patches on the inside, orange plastic webbed feet texture, little toe details to mimic flippers, glossy shine to look like penguin feathers, and a tiny fish emblem on the side.

options.name: Lava Stompers
options.flavourText: Only slightly warm to the touch. Great for staying motivated.
options.imageDesc: Deep red cleats with flowing orange and yellow lava-like patterns across the surface, black crusty texture representing cooled magma, glowing orange cracks between the crusty sections suggesting heat beneath, and molten drips hanging from the sole.

options.name: Crystal Slippers
options.flavourText: Royalty not required, but your teammates will bow anyway.
options.imageDesc: Light blue translucent cleats with white crystalline facets carved into geometric patterns covering the surface, sparkly silver highlights reflecting from each facet, tiny gemstone studs along the heel and toe, and an iridescent rainbow shimmer effect overall.

options.name: Squid Grip Shoes
options.flavourText: Eight tentacles of traction. You still have two feet though.
options.imageDesc: Dark teal and purple cleats with suction cup designs covering the bottom and sides, wavy tentacle-like grooves running along the edges, shimmering iridescent purple patches suggesting squid ink coloring, and small curved hook shapes at pressure points.

options.name: Rainbow Runners
options.flavourText: Leaves a trail of happiness and confused defenders in your wake.
options.imageDesc: White cleats with a bold rainbow gradient stripe running from heel to toe, each color section is vibrant and distinct with glitter texture, white puffy clouds at the toe and heel, and pastel accents between colors.
options.colors: white, rainbow gradient, pastel pink, gold

options.name: Dinosaur Stompers
options.flavourText: Three-toed prehistoric power. Your opponent will recognize the footprint.
options.imageDesc: Dark green and brown cleats with three prominent clawed toes extending forward like a velociraptor foot, scaly reptilian texture across the surface with darker lines suggesting plates, a long curved spike on the heel, and muddy brown weathering marks.
options.colors: dark green, brown, muddy tan, black

options.name: Rocket Boots
options.flavourText: Leave fiery trails as you zoom past defenders!
options.imageDesc: Sleek futuristic cleats with chrome plating, bright orange and yellow flame accents along the sides, glowing neon blue heels with pointed rocket exhaust ports, metallic silver toe caps with small protruding fins.
options.colors: chrome silver, neon orange, electric blue, flame yellow

options.name: Dragon Talons
options.flavourText: Stomp with the fury of a fire-breathing dragon!
options.imageDesc: Intimidating red and purple cleats shaped like dragon feet, sharp curved metal studs resembling claws, gold trim around the ankle, dark scales pattern embossed on the sides, wisps of smoke effect around the spikes.
options.colors: dragon red, deep purple, gold, charcoal black

options.name: Pepper Zappers
options.flavourText: Too spicy for the other team to handle!
options.imageDesc: Bright red chili pepper-themed boots with yellow lightning bolt patterns, electric purple accents on the sole, small yellow spark details scattered across the surface, hot sauce drip design near the heel.
options.colors: chili red, mustard yellow, electric purple, white

options.name: Cloud Walkers
options.flavourText: Float through the game like you are walking on air!
options.imageDesc: Soft white and light blue cleats with fluffy cloud-like texture details, silver lightning bolt patterns stitched across the toe, pale cyan accents, puffy cushioning visible on the sides.
options.colors: cloud white, sky blue, silver, pale cyan

options.name: Jellyfish Jumpers
options.flavourText: Bounce higher with squishy, wobbly superpowers!
options.imageDesc: Translucent glowing blue and purple boots with a jellyfish-inspired bell-shaped top, trailing tentacle-like ribbed appendages hanging from the sides and back, gelatinous texture with shimmer effects, neon green suction cup details on the bottom.
options.colors: jellyfish pink, bioluminescent purple, neon green, clear white

options.name: Ninja Shadow Kicks
options.flavourText: Strike without a sound. Your opponents won't see you coming!
options.imageDesc: Sleek all-black stealth boots with dark purple metallic sheen, crimson red accent stripes along the sides, small throwing star emblems on the toe, matte finish with subtle shadows suggesting movement.
options.colors: deep black, dark purple, crimson red, gunmetal gray

options.name: Spaghetti Sprint Shoes
options.flavourText: Slippery, saucy, and ready to slide to glory!
options.imageDesc: Silly pasta-themed cleats with tan and wheat brown base, red marinara sauce splatter pattern across the surface, golden olive oil drip details on the sides, noodle-like laces that look like spaghetti.
options.colors: pasta tan, marinara red, olive green, golden yellow

options.name: Thunder Stompers
options.flavourText: Every step creates a lightning bolt of pure speed!
options.imageDesc: Powerful yellow and black striped cleats like a storm cloud, electric blue lightning bolt treads on the bottom, metallic silver electrodes protruding from the heel and toe, crackling energy lines etched into the surface.
options.colors: storm yellow, thunder black, electric blue, metallic silver

options.name: Peacock Prancers
options.flavourText: Strut onto the field in fabulous, feathered style!
options.imageDesc: Flamboyant cleats with iridescent turquoise and emerald base, fan-shaped feather design in rainbow colors erupting from the heel, deep purple accents, shimmering sequin-like details across the surface.
options.colors: iridescent turquoise, rainbow feather mix, royal purple, emerald green

options.name: Asteroid Crushers
options.flavourText: Boom! You are unstoppable like a space rock!
options.imageDesc: Heavy-duty gray and brown rocky cleats with crater patterns, jagged irregular surface texture like broken stone, bright orange and yellow glowing lava lines through the cracks, metallic cores visible beneath the surface.
options.colors: space gray, crater brown, lava orange, molten yellow

options.name: Rocket Boosters
options.flavourText: So fast they leave a fiery trail behind you.
options.imageDesc: Neon orange cleats with glowing blue rocket thrusters mounted on the heels. Silver metallic accents, flame patterns streaking down the sides, small circular exhaust ports on the sole.
options.colors: neon orange, electric blue, silver, black

options.name: Dragon Claw Kicks
options.flavourText: Legendary boots that make you feel like a mythical beast.
options.imageDesc: Deep crimson cleats shaped like dragon claws with golden scale texturing. Sharp pointed studs that resemble scales, glowing amber accents on the toe and ankle, wispy smoke-like patterns.
options.colors: deep crimson, golden yellow, amber, dark purple

options.name: Cheetah Sprint
options.flavourText: Spots make you zoom faster, probably because they look cool.
options.imageDesc: Golden-tan cleats with bold black spot patterns. Sleek, aerodynamic design with a muscular profile. Leopard-spot texture throughout, white stripe accents down the center, small feather-like details on the heel.

options.name: Pizza Blaster
options.flavourText: Cheesy boots that make you unstoppable. Literally covered in cheese.
options.imageDesc: Red tomato-colored cleats with melted yellow cheese texture dripping down. Pepperoni slice circles scattered across the surface. Mozzarella white swirls, crusty crust-colored brown sole with bubbly texture details.
options.colors: tomato red, melted yellow, mozzarella white, crust brown

options.name: Lightning Strikers
options.flavourText: Boots filled with actual lightning. Don't ask how.
options.imageDesc: Sleek white cleats with jagged electric blue lightning bolt patterns covering the entire surface. Bright cyan glowing accents along edges and studs. Purple discharge effects near the sole, crackling texture details.
options.colors: bright white, electric blue, cyan, purple

options.name: Ninja Shadows
options.flavourText: So silent, defenders won't know you are coming.
options.imageDesc: All-black cleats with a ninja shoe silhouette. Dark gray striped patterns mimicking cloth bindings. Red accent stitching in geometric patterns, small metallic silver studs arranged like throwing stars, fuzzy textured ankle area.
options.colors: jet black, dark gray, red, metallic silver

options.name: Comet Crushers
options.flavourText: Boots made from actual space rock. Totally real.
options.imageDesc: Silver-gray metallic cleats with cratered, pitted texture like asteroid surface. Bright cyan crystalline formations jutting out from the studs. Swirling cosmic purple and blue gradient patterns, glowing energy core visible through translucent heel section.
options.colors: silver-gray, cosmic blue, cyan, deep purple

options.name: Thunder Hooves
options.flavourText: Unicorn magic inside every boot. Rainbow not included.
options.imageDesc: Iridescent pearl cleats that shift between pink and blue hues. Spiral horn-shaped studs, flowing mane-like fabric details on the ankle. Magical sparkle texture throughout, star and moon embellishments, ethereal wisps painted on the sides.
options.colors: pearl white, iridescent pink, sky blue, sparkle gold

options.name: Inferno Stompers
options.flavourText: Literally on fire. Your feet are now a hazard.
options.imageDesc: Intense orange-red cleats with flame licking up from the toe and heel. Glowing yellow-white hot spots on the studs and sole. Blackened charred texture on parts of the surface, with ember-like orange dots scattered throughout.
options.colors: inferno orange, flame yellow, white-hot, charcoal black

options.name: Crystal Prism Kicks
options.flavourText: Refract light so bright, goalies can't see straight.
options.imageDesc: Translucent iridescent cleats that refract rainbow light. Faceted gemstone pattern covering entire surface like cut diamonds. Prism-blue base with lighter diamond shapes, rainbow sparkle effects on studs and edges, mirror-like reflective sections.
options.colors: prism blue, diamond white, rainbow spectrum, sparkle silver

options.name: Rocket Boots
options.flavourText: Goes so fast, the ball can't keep up!
options.imageDesc: Sleek silver and neon orange rocket-themed cleats with flame designs on the sides, glowing neon accents along the heel, metallic finish with sharp angular lines resembling jet engines.

options.name: Dragon Talons
options.flavourText: Claw your way to victory, one pass at a time.
options.imageDesc: Crimson red cleats shaped like dragon feet with curved golden claws as studs, scaled texture across the upper, smoke-like wisps etched into the leather, fierce expression on the toe.
options.colors: crimson red, gold, dark gray, orange

options.name: Spaghetti Stompers
options.flavourText: Ketchup AND mustard, the ultimate flavor combo!
options.imageDesc: Comical red and yellow striped cleats designed to look like ketchup and mustard bottles, with white condiment drips running down the sides, googly eyes on the toe cap.

options.name: Bubble Blasters
options.flavourText: Pop passes with explosive accuracy!
options.imageDesc: Translucent iridescent cleats with colorful bubble patterns all over, shimmering pearl finish, bubble shapes of varying sizes embossed across the surface, holographic shimmer effects.
options.colors: iridescent pink, pearl white, sky blue, mint green

options.name: Penguin Waddles
options.flavourText: Waddle faster. Pass better. Look adorable doing it.
options.imageDesc: Black and white cleats shaped like penguin feet with webbed sole detail, cute round toe design, white belly patch on the front, little orange flipper-like side wings.

options.name: Thunder Cleats
options.flavourText: Electric passes that strike opponents with awe!
options.imageDesc: Deep purple cleats with bright yellow lightning bolt patterns crackling across the surface, electric blue glowing trim along edges, jagged zigzag texture, sparkling metallic accents.
options.colors: deep purple, electric yellow, cyan, silver

options.name: Pirate Hook-Kicks
options.flavourText: Yo-ho-ho! This boot is truly legendary.
options.imageDesc: Weathered brown leather cleats with a curved golden hook-shaped stud pattern, tattered rope details wrapped around the ankle area, skull and crossbones emblem on the heel, aged worn texture.

options.name: Moonlight Slippers
options.flavourText: Glide across the pitch like you are floating!
options.imageDesc: Soft lavender cleats with silver crescent moon and star patterns, silky smooth gradient texture fading to pale white, glowing ethereal trim, dreamy cloud designs scattered throughout.

options.name: Turbo Taco Boots
options.flavourText: Spicy passes served faster than dinner!
options.imageDesc: Golden-brown cleats molded to resemble taco shells, cheese-yellow streaks and details, red and green salsa-colored splatter patterns, crunchy texture across the surface, silly face on the toe.

options.name: Cosmic Treads
options.flavourText: Star power in every step across the galaxy!
options.imageDesc: Deep space blue cleats covered in constellation patterns and tiny star studs, swirling nebula effects in purple and pink, glowing white star outlines, metallic cosmic dust shimmer throughout.
options.colors: deep blue, cosmic purple, hot pink, white

options.name: Lucky Lobster Kicks
options.flavourText: Pinching the ball into the net with oversized claws.
options.imageDesc: Bright red cleats shaped like lobster claws, with thick articulated segments and prominent pincers at the toe. Covered in a chitinous texture with white accents on the joints. Small bubbles float around the heel.

options.name: Disco Boots of Destiny
options.flavourText: Your feet are a mirror ball. Goals sparkle.
options.imageDesc: Shimmering silver and white cleats covered in thousands of small hexagonal mirrors and rhinestones. Reflective disco ball texture across entire surface with gold trim around the ankle. Leaves a glittering trail.

options.name: Comet Strikers
options.flavourText: You ARE the meteor. The ball never saw it coming.
options.imageDesc: Sleek white cleats with a streaking comet tail design blazing from the heel to toe in bright orange and yellow. Metallic sheen with flame-like patterns. Small trailing particles visible along edges.

options.name: Jelly Bean Boosters
options.flavourText: Sugary sweet feet with an unexpected kick.
options.imageDesc: Plump, round cleats that look like giant translucent jelly beans in mixed candy colors. Shiny, bumpy candy-coated texture. Small sugar crystals glitter on the surface.

options.name: Fortune Cookie Cleats
options.flavourText: Each step reveals your lucky future. Usually goals.
options.imageDesc: Golden-brown cleats shaped and textured like crispy fortune cookies, partially curled. Fortune paper strips peek out from the folds with gold lettering. Dusted with sesame seeds and a warm honey glow.

options.name: Stardust Steppers
options.flavourText: Leave a trail of shimmering wishes across the pitch.
options.imageDesc: Pale periwinkle cleats studded with glowing star-shaped crystals in white and pale blue. Swirling cosmic dust patterns painted across the surface. Ethereal glow effect with a gradient from deep purple at heel to white at toe.

options.name: Prismatic Piranhas
options.flavourText: Hungry cleats that bite with kaleidoscope precision.
options.imageDesc: Angular, predatory-looking cleats shaped like fish heads with open mouths. Split-colored design with geometric prism segments in cyan, magenta, and yellow. Sharp teeth texture along the toe box. Scales shimmer with iridescent effects.

options.name: Wishing Well Walkers
options.flavourText: Every goal is a coin dropped into destiny itself.
options.imageDesc: Cobalt blue cleats with a coin-inlay pattern across the toe and sides. Gold coins of various denominations embossed into the leather. Ringed water ripple texture from a central pattern. Pearl-white accents simulate light reflecting off water.
options.colors: cobalt blue, gold, pearl white, copper

options.name: Nebula Navigators
options.flavourText: The universe bends around your footwork.
options.imageDesc: Deep space-themed cleats with swirling nebula clouds in turquoise, pink, and purple. Scattered white star-like dots and glowing nebula wisps across the surface. Dark navy base with a dreamy, cosmic gradient flowing from heel to toe.

options.name: Moonstone Marauders
options.flavourText: Pale and mystical. The ball doesn't stand a chance.
options.imageDesc: Luminescent opalescent cleats that shift between soft blue, white, and pale pink depending on the angle. Smooth, polished surface with internal milky swirls like real moonstone. Subtle crescent moon symbols etched along the side. Glowing inner light effect.

options.name: Thunder Treads
options.flavourText: Sparks fly with every step. Shoes smell like burnt toast.
options.imageDesc: Sleek black cleats with jagged yellow lightning bolt patterns running down the sides and across the toe box. Electric blue piping along the seams. Metallic silver studs on the sole. Crackling energy effect around the edges.

options.name: Dragon Claw Boots
options.flavourText: Shaped like dragon claws. Very sharp. Very deadly.
options.imageDesc: High-top dragon-inspired boots with crimson red leather and claw-like protrusions on the toe and heel. Gold accents along the edges forming dragon scales. Fiery orange flames painted on the ankle band.

options.name: Candy Crush Kicks
options.flavourText: Made from compressed gummy bears. Surprisingly sticky grip.
options.imageDesc: Colorful candy-themed cleats featuring swirled pastel colors: pink, mint green, and light purple. Candy wrapper-pattern panels on the sides. Glossy finish with white lollipop designs on the tongue. Sugar-crystal texture details on the sole.
options.colors: candy pink, mint green, lavender, white

options.name: Volcano Stompers
options.flavourText: Leave burning footprints on the pitch. Groundskeeper is mad.
options.imageDesc: Rugged dark brown and deep red cleats with a molten lava effect. Glowing orange cracks across the surface like active lava. Black volcanic ash texture covering the upper. Bright red ember accents on the laces and sole.
options.colors: dark brown, lava red, orange, black

options.name: Moonlight Prancers
options.flavourText: Glow softly at night. Perfect for midnight practice.
options.imageDesc: Elegant silvery-white cleats with a pearlescent sheen. Crescent moon symbols embossed on the side panels. Pale blue starlight accents trailing across the shoe. Soft cyan glow effect on the edges and sole studs.
options.colors: pearl white, pale blue, silver, cyan

options.name: Sticky Gecko Feet
options.flavourText: Can climb anything. Even vertical walls (probably).
options.imageDesc: Lime green cleats designed to mimic gecko toe pads. Bumpy textured panels covering the shoe surface in a suction-cup pattern. Brown branch-like detail on the ankle. Tiny red gecko eye symbols on the heel.

options.name: Ice Age Skates
options.flavourText: Frozen solid. Slippery. Possibly a hazard.
options.imageDesc: Crystalline icy-blue and white cleats with jagged ice-shard patterns. Frosted translucent sections revealing frozen details inside. Glacier white accents and icicle formations hanging from the sole. Light cyan shimmer across the surface.
options.colors: ice blue, white, cyan, pale gray

options.name: Pirate Plank Boots
options.flavourText: Smells like saltwater and regret. Arrr.
options.imageDesc: Weathered wooden-texture brown cleats with a pirate ship aesthetic. Tattered black fabric panels like torn sails. Gold coin decorations on the sides. Skull and crossbones emblem on the tongue. Dark red stripe mimicking dried blood.
options.colors: weathered brown, black, gold, dark red

options.name: Meteor Crushers
options.flavourText: Hardened meteor steel. Heavier than they look.
options.imageDesc: Chunky dark gray cleats with a rocky, cratered metallic surface. Streaks of bright silver and copper running through like metal ore veins. Jagged edges that look like broken meteorite fragments. Bronze studs protruding from the sole.

options.name: Panda Power Peds
options.flavourText: Black and white. Adorably strong.
options.imageDesc: Bold panda-themed cleats with primary black and white color blocking. Black paw pad patterns on the sole and heel. Large white circular panels on the sides with black ring details around them like panda eyes. Soft fuzzy texture effect on the upper.

options.name: Hawk Strike
options.flavourText: Dives from the sky and strikes the net.
options.imageDesc: A brown and cream jersey with swooping hawk talons reaching down the front, fierce eye on collar, wing tip shoulders, prey-tracking lines

options.name: Mortar Vest
options.flavourText: Lobs shots that fall from the heavens. Kaboom.
options.imageDesc: A military green jersey with mortar tube on shoulder, arc trajectory dotted line across chest, explosion star at impact point

options.name: Thunderbird Top
options.flavourText: A mythical beast that shoots lightning goals.
options.imageDesc: A bright blue and red jersey with Native American thunderbird design wings spread, lightning from beak, storm cloud patterns

options.name: Trebuchet Shirt
options.flavourText: The superior siege engine. Also the superior jersey.
options.imageDesc: A wooden-brown jersey with trebuchet arm across chest in firing position, stone projectile, counterweight design at hem

options.name: Valkyrie Jersey
options.flavourText: Descends from above to strike the winning goal.
options.imageDesc: A silver and white jersey with Valkyrie wings on shoulders, Norse knotwork patterns, spear design down the center, warrior helm on collar

options.name: Osprey Vest
options.flavourText: Spots the goal from altitude and never misses.
options.imageDesc: A white and dark brown jersey with osprey diving pose on chest, fish-catching talons, water splash at waist, keen eye designs

options.name: Hailstorm Top
options.flavourText: Rains down shots like a storm of icy goals.
options.imageDesc: A dark grey stormy jersey with hailstones pelting across chest, ice crystal patterns, thundercloud shoulders, frost accents

options.name: Bomber Shirt
options.flavourText: Strategic high-altitude goal delivery system.
options.imageDesc: A olive drab jersey with vintage bomber plane silhouette on chest, bomb bay doors open, nose art pin-up replaced with football

options.name: Zeus Jersey
options.flavourText: Throws thunderbolts from Mount Olympus into the net.
options.imageDesc: A white and gold jersey with Zeus thunderbolt in hand pose, Greek temple columns on sides, cloud toga draping, lightning crown

options.name: Sniper Vest
options.flavourText: One shot. One goal. From the other end.
options.imageDesc: A dark camo jersey with crosshair scope on chest, precision targeting lines, bullet trail pattern from shoulder to waist

options.name: Catapult Vest
options.flavourText: Launches passes with medieval siege power.
options.imageDesc: A brown wooden jersey with catapult arm design on chest, stone boulder ready to launch, castle wall pattern, rope pulley details

options.name: Gorilla Shirt
options.flavourText: Throws passes with eight hundred pounds of force.
options.imageDesc: A dark grey jersey with silverback gorilla on chest beating its chest, banana patterns, jungle vine trim, powerful arm designs

options.name: Hammer Top
options.flavourText: Hammers passes so hard they leave dents.
options.imageDesc: A metallic grey jersey with Thor's hammer on chest, lightning crackling around it, Norse rune patterns, chain mail shoulders

options.name: Cannon Jersey
options.flavourText: Cannonball passes across the entire field.
options.imageDesc: A navy jersey with ship cannon on chest, smoking fuse, cannonball arc trajectory pattern, pirate flag shoulder, ship rope trim

options.name: Trebuchet Shirt
options.flavourText: Superior siege engineering for superior passing.
options.imageDesc: A wooden-brown jersey with trebuchet in launch position on chest, counterweight at waist, stone projectile in arc, castle backdrop

options.name: Elephant Vest
options.flavourText: Never forgets a teammate and throws like a truck.
options.imageDesc: A grey jersey with elephant head on chest with trunk raised passing a ball, big ear shoulders, tusk collar points, savannah grass hem

options.name: Lumberjack Top
options.flavourText: Chops through defenses then logs a perfect assist.
options.imageDesc: A red plaid flannel jersey with crossed axes on chest, wood chip patterns, pine tree trim, beard scruff collar texture

options.name: Slingshot Shirt
options.flavourText: David's weapon of choice for precision power passes.
options.imageDesc: A leather-brown jersey with giant slingshot on chest, river stone patterns, elastic band stretch lines, shepherd staff sides

options.name: Hippo Jersey
options.flavourText: Surprisingly accurate for something this massive.
options.imageDesc: A purple-grey jersey with hippopotamus face on chest with mouth wide open, river water splashes, lily pad hem, water bird shoulder

options.name: Boulder Vest
options.flavourText: Rolls unstoppable passes that flatten everything.
options.imageDesc: A rocky brown jersey with rolling boulder on chest leaving crushed path, Indiana Jones hat nod, temple ruin patterns, dust cloud

options.name: Magic Wand
options.flavourText: Waves the wand. Ball magically reaches teammate.
options.imageDesc: A deep purple jersey with sparkling magic wand on chest casting swirly spell, star burst patterns, wizard hat collar, glitter trail

options.flavourText: Houston, we have liftoff... and a header goal!
options.imageDesc: A sleek silver jersey with red rocket fins on the shoulders, exhaust flame patterns along the sides, NASA-style patches

options.name: Trampoline Top
options.flavourText: Boing boing boing — that's not jumping, that's FLYING.
options.imageDesc: A bouncy spring-themed jersey with coiled springs on shoulders and waist, stretchy fabric look, bounce lines radiating outward

options.name: Eagle Tunic
options.flavourText: Soars above defenders like they're tiny field mice.
options.imageDesc: A majestic feathered jersey with eagle wing patterns across the chest, sharp talons on the hem, fierce eagle eyes on collar

options.name: Stilts Shirt
options.flavourText: Technically not cheating if the stilts are invisible.
options.imageDesc: A circus-themed striped jersey with wooden stilt patterns on the sides, star decorations, big top tent collar design

options.name: Redwood Jersey
options.flavourText: Been growing taller since the dinosaurs played footy.
options.imageDesc: A bark-textured brown jersey with tree ring patterns on chest, tiny green pine branches on shoulders, ancient wood grain

options.name: Hot Air Shirt
options.flavourText: Full of hot air and that's actually a good thing.
options.imageDesc: A colorful striped jersey shaped like a hot air balloon basket at the waist, balloon panels across the chest in rainbow stripes

options.name: Skyscraper Vest
options.flavourText: Other players need an elevator to reach this collar.
options.imageDesc: A grey jersey with building window patterns, tiny antenna on collar, glass and steel texture, city skyline silhouette along the bottom

options.name: Bull Jersey
options.flavourText: Charges like a freight train with anger issues.
options.imageDesc: A red jersey with snorting bull face on chest, sharp horns on collar, hoof print patterns, arena dust clouds at hem

options.name: Train Shirt
options.flavourText: Full steam ahead and no brakes whatsoever.
options.imageDesc: A black and silver jersey with steam locomotive front on chest, piston arm patterns on sides, smoke stack collar, track stripe hem

options.name: Ram Vest
options.flavourText: Headbutts through defenders at ramming speed.
options.imageDesc: A grey jersey with bighorn ram face on chest, curled horn shoulder pads, mountain goat hoof prints, rocky texture

options.name: Torpedo Top
options.flavourText: Launched from the midfield, unstoppable to the goal.
options.imageDesc: A metallic silver jersey with torpedo shape design on chest, propeller spin on back, underwater bubble trail, naval stripe

options.name: Warthog Shirt
options.flavourText: Ugly, mean, and coming at you full speed.
options.imageDesc: A muddy brown jersey with warthog tusks on collar, wiry hair texture, mud splash patterns, savannah grass accents at hem

options.name: Battering Ram
options.flavourText: Castle doors? Defensive walls? Same thing. CRASH.
options.imageDesc: A wooden-iron jersey with battering ram head on chest, metal bands, siege warfare patterns, splinter effects, castle debris

options.name: Rhino Vest
options.flavourText: Two tons of fast and absolutely no patience.
options.imageDesc: A thick grey armored jersey with rhino charging pose on chest, dust cloud trail, armor plate texture, horn on collar

options.name: Moose Jersey
options.flavourText: Giant antlers AND surprising speed. Nature's tank.
options.imageDesc: A brown jersey with massive moose antler rack on shoulders, forest pine tree patterns, Canadian maple leaf, snow dust accents

options.name: Juggernaut Top
options.flavourText: An unstoppable force wearing a very cool shirt.
options.imageDesc: A dark red jersey with armored juggernaut helmet on chest, spiked shoulder designs, momentum lines, cracked ground patterns

options.name: Avalanche Shirt
options.flavourText: Starts small, then crushes everything in its path.
options.imageDesc: A white and grey jersey with avalanche snow cascade design from shoulder to hem, pine trees being swept away, powder clouds

options.name: Clover Jersey
options.flavourText: Four leaves of pure, undeserved good fortune.
options.imageDesc: A bright green jersey with oversized four-leaf clover on chest, shamrock patterns scattered, golden sparkle accents, lucky charm trim

options.name: Dice Vest
options.flavourText: Always rolls sixes. Always. It's suspicious.
options.imageDesc: A white jersey with large red dice tumbling across chest showing all sixes, casino chip patterns, felt-table green trim

options.name: Horseshoe Top
options.flavourText: Magnetically attracts good luck and deflects bad tackles.
options.imageDesc: A silver jersey with golden horseshoe on chest pointing up, magnetic field lines, lucky penny patterns scattered about

options.name: Cat Shirt
options.flavourText: Has nine lives and uses them all in one match.
options.imageDesc: A black jersey with lucky black cat silhouette on chest, yellow cat eyes glowing, fish bone patterns, yarn ball accents

options.name: Rabbit Jersey
options.flavourText: Lucky feet on a lucky shirt. Double lucky!
options.imageDesc: A fluffy white jersey with rabbit foot charms dangling from hem, bunny ear collar, carrot patterns, cotton tail on back

options.name: Rainbow Vest
options.flavourText: There's a pot of goals at the end of this.
options.imageDesc: A jersey with full rainbow arc across the chest, pot of gold on the hem, rain cloud shoulders that sparkle, leprechaun buckle

options.name: Wishbone Top
options.flavourText: Made a wish. The wish was more goals. Granted.
options.imageDesc: A cream jersey with golden wishbone on chest, star-wish trail patterns, turkey feather shoulder accents, magical sparkle dots

options.name: Fortune Shirt
options.flavourText: The fortune cookie said: you will score today.
options.imageDesc: A red and gold jersey with fortune cookie opening on chest revealing a paper slip, Chinese lantern patterns, lucky number 8s

options.name: Penny Vest
options.flavourText: Found heads-up. Picked it up. Won the match.
options.imageDesc: A copper-toned jersey with giant shiny penny on chest, Lincoln profile, date stamps, coin stack patterns along sides

options.name: Ladybug Jersey
